underlying_goal: Optimize Claude Code configuration for developer efficiency, starting with fixing auto-compact behavior and then applying additional optimizations from the latest changelog
friction_detail: Claude used a wrong config field name that the validator rolled back, and the user interrupted Claude's edits twice during the optimization phase.
brief_summary: User wanted to fix auto-compact and apply changelog-based optimizations; the auto-compact fix succeeded but the follow-up config edits were interrupted and partially incorrect, leaving the broader optimization incomplete.
